title: Catalog Verification TODO
description: One entry per pattern and per framework. Tracks per-aspect verification status so agents (or contributors) can work through the list item-by-item. Aspect values: 'todo' (not yet checked), 'pass' (verified correct), 'fail' (verified wrong, needs fix), 'na' (does not apply to this entry). Top-level 'verified' is true only when every applicable aspect is pass.

patterns.intent_one_sentence: intent reads as exactly one sentence under 35 words
patterns.context_clear: context is plain English a developer new to the area can follow
patterns.problem_clear: problem clearly states what fails without this pattern
patterns.solution_clear: solution describes the mechanism without recourse to undefined jargon
patterns.constrains_is_restriction: constrains slot reads as a restriction (forbids/must/only) not a benefit
patterns.example_scenario_present: example_scenario field is populated with a plain-English narrative
patterns.diagram_present: diagram.mermaid renders to a meaningful sequence/flow/class/state diagram
patterns.applicability_present: applicability.use_when and do_not_use_when bullets are populated
patterns.variants_present: variants[] populated where the pattern has known implementation shapes
patterns.known_uses_live: every known_uses URL is alive and points to the named system
patterns.no_jargon_undefined: any acronym used in prose is defined in glossary.json or expanded in-place
patterns.edges_correct: every related[] edge points at a real pattern; symmetric/inverse pairs balance

frameworks.vendor_correct: vendor field names the actual maintainer
frameworks.language_correct: language field reflects the framework's primary languages
frameworks.coverage_cells_accurate: every coverage cell (fully/limited/none) reflects current docs
frameworks.no_missing_pattern_support: patterns the framework clearly supports are not omitted from coverage
frameworks.last_analyzed_within_quarter: last_analyzed is within the last 90 days

notes.text: Pattern content revised in commit 06ef38e (intent tightened, constrains rewritten as restriction, applicability/variants added, German quotes translated, reciprocal edges patched). Re-verifying from scratch.
notes.author: Marco Nissen

notes.text: Walked all 13 aspects. Pass: intent (26 words, one sentence), context, problem, solution, constrains-as-restriction, applicability, references (all 200), no-jargon, edges (all targets exist, all symmetric). NA: variants (anti-pattern). Fail: example_scenario and diagram.mermaid not populated (catalog-wide gap, do not fabricate). Fail: known_uses URL https://github.com/luxxyarns/sparrot returns 404 — Sparrot repo URL is dead, needs replacement; pattern remains valid as authored.
notes.author: Marco Nissen

notes.text: Walked all 6 framework aspects. Pass: vendor (Marco Nissen / luxxyarns), language (Python), coverage_cells (all 16 Sparrot-authored patterns marked fully — consistent with author intent), no_missing_pattern_support (no other Sparrot-claimed patterns omitted), last_analyzed (2026-05-01, within quarter).
